draft_only_warning: AI-assisted draft only. This output does not approve the method, protocol, report, validation conclusion, or regulatory strategy.
human_review_statement: 本文件由 AI 輔助產生，於 GxP、供應商溝通或法規用途使用前，必須由負責之 analytical lead、QA、RA 及 / 或 method owner 審閱確認。
default_acceptance_criteria_prefix: Draft criterion requires confirmation with method development data and human review
default_deviation_handling: All deviations, invalid runs, repeats, and data exclusions require documentation, impact assessment, and analytical lead / QA review before final use.
